title: refactor(gen-routes): dedupe model-list, audio dispatch, and base64 helpers
author: voodoohop
pr_body_excerpt:
- Extract `dispatchAudioGeneration` for the TTS/music model cascade duplicated between `handleSimpleAudio` and POST `/speech`; parse the JSON body once
- Add a `modelsListHandler(getModels)` factory for the model-list endpoint boilerplate repeated 6×
- Extract `assertStreamContentType` (chat-completions/`/text`) and a single chunked `arrayBufferToBase64` in util.ts
- Share the image-vs-video model-split filter between proxy.ts and docs.ts; drop a redundant try/catch (global onError already maps it)

Verified non-breaking: biome clean, affected tests green vs the main baseline. Net −30 lines.
- Note: skipped an optional add-only test (Optional GET elevenmusic seed=-1 assertion (sub-it) — fixture lacks pack balance to reach the path; the dedup itself is fully implemented and covered indirectly.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

gist.headline: Spring cleaning the routes
gist.blurb: We've swept through the generation routes, deduplicating audio dispatch and model-list handlers to keep the codebase clean and snappy.
gist.summary: Refactored the generation API routes to deduplicate audio dispatch logic, model-list handlers, and base64 helpers across the codebase.
gist.impact: This internal cleanup reduces code duplication by 30 lines, making the API routing architecture easier to maintain for future updates.
